svg.text: Dock Back Wall (Fitting Mount Wall) — Engineering Drawing
Material: PETG | Envelope: 148W x 10D x 84H mm | Scale noted per view
2. Four tube stub pass-through holes: ⌀7mm thru with ⌀11mm counterbore (2mm deep) on front face for grommet seat.
3. Tube stubs: 1/4" OD (6.35mm nominal, 6.30mm measured) hard nylon, ~60-80mm total length.
4. Front protrusion ~30mm into cartridge cavity. Cartridge JG union fittings (PP0408W) slide onto bare tube stubs during dock-in.
5. Hole pattern: 2x2 grid, 40mm horizontal x 28mm vertical center-to-center, centered on wall face.
6. Lower row = inlet tubes; upper row = outlet tubes. Rear stubs connect to valve rack tubing.
7. Pogo pin mount area on ceiling face (top surface, Z=80-84) not shown — see separate drawing.
